name: AI Competitor Intelligence Briefing: Daily Monitoring with OpenAI and Gmail

nodes.name: Extract Text and Build AI Prompt

// Wrap the AI-generated HTML in a styled email template const res = $input.item.json; const meta = $('Aggregate and Build Briefing Prompt').item.json; const bodyHtml = res.choices && res.choices[0] && res.choices[0].message && res.choices[0].message.content ? res.choices[0].message.content : '

Error: Briefing generation failed. Check your OpenAI credentials.

'; const emailHtml = [ '', '', '', 'Competitor Intelligence Briefing', '', '
', '
', '

Competitor Intelligence Briefing

', '

' + meta.your_company + '  ·  ' + meta.run_date + '  ·  ' + meta.competitor_count + ' competitor(s) monitored

', '
', '
' + bodyHtml + '
', '
Auto-generated by n8n AI Competitor Intelligence Workflow
', '
' ].join(''); const plainText = bodyHtml.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); return [{ json: { email_html: emailHtml, email_plain: plainText, report_email: meta.report_email, your_company: meta.your_company, run_date: meta.run_date, competitor_count: meta.competitor_count } }];

parameters.content:
## AI Competitor Intelligence Briefing using OpenAI and Gmail

Know what your competitors are doing every morning before your first meeting. This workflow visits each competitor website daily, uses AI to analyse it for strategic signals, and emails your team a consolidated executive briefing automatically.

### How it works

1. A schedule trigger fires every morning at 8AM.
2. The Configure node loops through each competitor URL you have added.
3. Each competitor page is fetched and stripped down to clean readable text.
4. OpenAI GPT-4o-mini reads the content and extracts key signals, threat level, and recommended actions.
5. All individual analyses are aggregated and sent to GPT-4o to write a consolidated executive briefing.
6. The briefing is formatted as a clean HTML email and sent to your team via Gmail.
7. Every run is logged to Google Sheets with the date, competitors analysed, and a summary.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **Competitors** -- Open the Configure Competitors and Settings node. Replace the placeholder URLs with your real competitor URLs and update the watch_for fields to describe what matters for each one.
- [ ] **Your details** -- In the same node, set YOUR_COMPANY to your company name and YOUR_FOCUS to your market category.
- [ ] **OpenAI** -- Add your OpenAI API key as a credential named OpenAI account. Get your key at platform.openai.com.
- [ ] **Gmail** -- Connect your Gmail account in the Send Email Briefing node. Update the REPORT_EMAIL value in the Configure node to your team email address.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** -- Create a sheet with columns: Date, Company, Competitors Analyzed, Briefing Summary. Open the Log to Google Sheets node, connect your Google account, and replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual sheet ID from the URL.
- [ ] Activate the workflow. It will run automatically every morning at 8AM.

### Customization

Change the trigger time in Daily 8AM Trigger to any hour that suits your team. Add more competitors in the Configure node -- the workflow handles any number. Swap GPT-4o-mini for GPT-4o in the AI Analyze Competitor node for deeper per-competitor analysis at higher cost.

## Schedule and configure

Fires every morning at 8AM and loops through your list of competitors. All settings -- URLs, company name, email recipient -- live in the Configure node so you only ever need to edit one place.

## Fetch, clean and analyse each competitor

Visits each competitor URL, strips the HTML down to readable text, then sends it to GPT-4o-mini to extract key signals, threat level, and a recommended action. Runs once per competitor in parallel.

## Compile, email and log

Aggregates all competitor analyses into a single prompt for GPT-4o, which writes the final executive briefing. The briefing is formatted as a clean HTML email, sent to your team, and logged to Google Sheets.

main.node: Extract Text and Build AI Prompt
